### Post by chacham23 on 2008-05-09
I add a second monitor(TV) with nvidia-setting and strange thing happened:
it seems that notification area isn't working for some reason..
[[IMG]http://img103.imageshack.us/img103/8462/screenshotql2.th.png[/IMG]](http://img103.imageshack.us/my.php?image=screenshotql2.png)

I checked and that happened only with the second monitor I dont have any idea why:confused:

Another problem(I think..) is that when I press "right click" on something it takes a long time till the menu is loaded(also when click on Applications or Places etc..) but I think is a compiz problem, I will try to get over compiz setting.
EDIT: the second problem seams to be OK on the tv screen (means that the fade time on my tv is ok..)

Thanks assaf :)

---

### Post by chacham23 on 2008-05-09
Fixed the problem :) :) 
sudo killall gnome-panel
fix it

---
